summary: Tested new Connect button feature across 3 pages: (1) Landing Page Final CTA section - Connect button visible next to 'Start Booking', dropdown shows 'WhatsApp Chat' and 'Quick Phone Call' options, WhatsApp opens in new tab (wa.me URL), Phone uses tel: protocol; (2) Venue Detail Page sidebar - Connect button visible below 'Speak to Our Venue Expert', dropdown fully functional; (3) My Enquiries page - Connect button visible in quick actions area, dropdown working. All dropdown close-on-outside-click functionality works. Old 'Request Callback' and 'Talk to Expert' buttons confirmed removed. ALL 7 FEATURES TESTED PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: ConnectButton component correctly implemented as reusable component at /app/frontend/src/components/ConnectButton.js
All 3 locations use the same ConnectButton component ensuring consistency
WhatsApp link correctly configured: https://wa.me/919876543210 with target='_blank'
Phone link correctly uses tel: protocol: tel:+919876543210
Dropdown positioning uses 'bottom-full' to appear above button
Outside click handler properly implemented via mousedown event listener with ref
All data-testid attributes present: connect-btn, connect-options, connect-whatsapp, connect-phone
test_credentials: admin@bookmyvenue.in / admin123 (used for My Enquiries page)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connect button feature complete. The reusable ConnectButton component is imported in 3 pages: LandingPage.js (line 901 in final-cta section), VenueDetailPage.js (line 880-882 in sidebar), MyEnquiriesPage.js (line 150-152 in quick actions). Key data-testids: connect-btn (main button), connect-options (dropdown container), connect-whatsapp (WhatsApp link), connect-phone (Phone link). Old buttons 'Request Callback' and 'Talk to Expert' have been removed from all 3 locations. Console shows some 401/404 errors for API calls (auth-related, unrelated to Connect button feature).
